relationships: ber:Zzayer teḥwaǧ isugan n umesni meqqren s waṭas ɣef wid yellan tur-a
ber:Sami iga laman deg waṭas n yimdanen aydeg ur yelli ara yessefk laman
ber:Yanni yekcem deg waṭas n wassaɣen beṛṛa i tissulya deg Zzayer Tamaneɣt
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsemt iman-nwent deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsem iman-nwen deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsed iman-nnem deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsed iman-nnek deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas
ber:Ibufucken llan s waṭas deg Dzayer Tamaneɣt
